noNotificationsDesc: You'll see updates about your campaigns here
signInToContinue: Sign in to continue managing your ads
startRunningAds: Start running TikTok ads in minutes
termsAgreement: By creating an account, you agree to our
createFirstLinkDesc: Create your first link page for your TikTok ads
dashFaqQuestion1: How do I create my first ad?
dashFaqAnswer1: Tap "Create New Ad" and follow the simple steps.
dashFaqQuestion2: How long until my ad goes live?
dashFaqAnswer2: After payment verification, your ad typically goes live within 30 minutes.
dashFaqQuestion3: Can I edit my campaign after submission?
dashFaqAnswer3: Once a campaign is approved and running, you can pause it but editing requires creating a new campaign.
dashFaqQuestion4: What payment methods do you accept?
dashFaqAnswer4: We accept credit cards and digital wallets. All payments are secure and encrypted.

heroSubtitle: Create your first ad and reach millions of users
createFirstAdReachMillions: Create your first ad and reach millions of users
dontKnowHowToUse: Don't know how to use our app?
faqCreateCampaign: How do I create a campaign?
faqCreateCampaignAnswer: Tap "Create New Ad" on the dashboard and follow the steps to launch your campaign.
faqPaymentMethodsAnswer: We currently accept FastPay, FIB, and SuperQi/Qi Card for manual transfers.
faqAdGoLive: How long does it take for my ad to go live?
faqAdGoLiveAnswer: After payment is verified and your content is approved, ads usually go live within 30–60 minutes.
faqEditCampaign: Can I edit an active campaign?
faqEditCampaignAnswer: Active campaigns cannot be edited. You can pause it and create a new campaign with the changes.
faqAddFunds: How do I add funds to my account?
faqAddFundsAnswer: Go to Wallet & Balance in Profile and follow the top-up instructions.
faqTrackPerformanceAnswer: Open Analytics to see views, clicks, spend, and results in real time.
faqRefundAnswer: Refunds depend on your service type. Please review the Refund Policy.
